modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to print due to jobs stuck in print queue.

full_description_text:  
I am experiencing an issue where my print jobs are stuck in the laptop print queue. The status on the HP printer's LCD screen indicates that it is processing, yet I cannot print to the color printer. This problem persists across all Windows devices connected to the networked HP printers.
short_description: Unable to print due to jobs stuck in print queue.
description: I am experiencing an issue where my print jobs are stuck in the laptop print queue. The status on the HP printer's LCD screen indicates that it is processing, yet I cannot print to the color printer. This problem persists across all Windows devices connected to the networked HP printers.
